description:
Operating Area: Greece

'Aquila' is a custom Cantieri FA built in Baglietto shipyard in 2006 and refitted in 2022 and in 2025! In 2025, the yacht AQUILA underwent a full refit, which included the installation of a deck jacuzzi and a complete renovation of the interior. All furniture, carpets, and curtains were replaced, giving the yacht a fresh and modern look. She has a beautiful and custom interior layout which allows 12 guests to relax in comfort in her unique spaces. She features five spacious en-suite staterooms; two Master suites (one with Jacuzzi bath), one VIP suite, two Twin suites - each with a Pullman berth. Rich wood detailing offers a sense of traditional luxury yet the modern décor and light fabrics create an airy atmosphere. Nine crew members are onboard to assure maximum service. ‘Aquila’ is the perfect yacht to discover the unknown hidden gems of the Greek islands.

She has a new jacuzzi on the sundeck.

She presents 5 en-suite cabins (2 Master cabins, one in the main deck with jacuzzi) and can accommodate up to 12 guests.

blueprint.name: AQUILA
tenders: Chase boat with Captain: 11 m Solemar with 2 x 250 hp

crew.name: Stavros Klozoris
crew.bio: Captain Stavros brings a wealth of knowledge, dedication, and passion to the maritime industry. With years of hands-on experience navigating vessels of various sizes, Stavros has honed his skills to ensure smooth and safe sailing for all passengers and crew. Holding a Master's license and maintaining an impeccable track record, he is recognized for his strong leadership abilities and meticulous attention to detail. Stavros has garnered praise and excellent feedback from charterers over the years, consistently delivering exceptional guest experiences. Fluent in multiple languages and well-versed in international maritime regulations, Stavros adeptly manages operations and fosters seamless communication onboard.

crew.name: George Boubouras
crew.bio:
George brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the role of Chief Officer.
With a background in special forces and military training as a sniper, coupled with 23 years of experience as a speedboat operator and owner, he possesses a diverse skill set that includes navigation, personnel management, and extensive knowledge in boat repairs and constructions. George has served as a captain on vessels ranging from 14 to 43 meters, including two years as captain of tugboats in Africa. Fluent in English and with proficiency in martial arts such as Krav Maga and kickboxing, George's dedication to excellence and his passion for adventure make him an invaluable asset to any crew. His hobbies include
marksmanship, free diving, and mountaineering, reflecting his adventurous spirit and commitment to continuous growth and learning.

crew.name: Konstantina Rokani
crew.bio:
Chief Stewardess Konstantina Rokani brings over 20 years of experience in luxury hospitality and yachting to her role, leading the interior department with confidence, elegance, and unmatched professionalism. Her long-standing career spans both private and charter yachts, where she has consistently delivered service of the highest standard. 

Known for her exceptional organizational abilities, warm demeanor, and dedication to guest satisfaction, Konstantina oversees all aspects of interior operations—from personalized guest service and housekeeping to event coordination and team training. Her calm leadership and attention to detail ensure that every guest enjoys a seamless, welcoming, and luxurious experience on board. 

Fluent in multiple languages and composed under pressure, she sets the tone for excellence across the interior team. Konstantina’s extensive experience, proactive mindset, and refined service style make her an invaluable asset and a key contributor to the success of every charter.

crew.name: Vivian Merkouriadis
crew.bio:
Vivian Merkouriadis brings poise, precision, and warmth to her role as 2nd Stewardess. With experience in luxury hospitality and both private and charter yachts, she delivers service marked by elegance, discretion, and attention to detail. 

Vivian is highly organized and known for her calm, proactive approach to guest care and interior management. Fluent in multiple languages, she helps create a welcoming and seamless experience for all onboard while supporting the interior team with grace and professionalism.
